title: Derivative Instruments: Which of the following is NOT a type of option?...
summary: Identify which instruments are classified as options versus other derivative types.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a type of option?

options.text: A forward contract is a different type of derivative that obligates the buyer

solution: A forward contract is a different type of derivative that obligates the buyer to purchase an asset at a predetermined future date. It is not an option type. [[24]]
